SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-27-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE STIPULATED TO SETTLEMENT: DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $8,00 CASH OR CERTIFIED FUNDS. PLAINTIFF TO RETURN COMPUTER (ASUS) IN OPERATING CONDITION, INCLUDING N VIDIA GRAPHICS CHIP. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STEPHEN PEARY--CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT SHEPPARD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED.
